source_url: vitiminD的重要性，原理、大部分人是否缺乏，要求有医学角度的案例佐证
english_script:
Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 21 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I watched a video about vitamin D. The video explained why vitamin D is so important for our health. It also talked about how many people don't get enough of it. The speaker was a doctor. He shared some medical cases to show the effects.

Vitamin D is not like other vitamins. Our body can make it when we go in the sun. But many people stay inside most of the day. So they don't make enough vitamin D. The doctor said that about 40% of people in the world have low vitamin D levels. That is a big number.

Vitamin D helps our body use calcium. Calcium is important for strong bones. Without enough vitamin D, bones can become weak and break easily. The doctor showed a case of a young woman. She had pain in her legs and back. She felt tired all the time. Her blood test showed very low vitamin D. After taking vitamin D for three months, her pain went away. She felt much better.

Another case was a child. The child had soft bones. This is called rickets. It is not common now, but it still happens. The child did not go outside much. He did not eat foods with vitamin D. The doctor gave him vitamin D and told him to play in the sun. After a few months, his bones became stronger.

Vitamin D also helps our immune system. It helps us fight sickness. The doctor said people with low vitamin D get sick more often. They may get colds or flu easier. In one study, people who took vitamin D every day had fewer colds.

From this video, I learned that vitamin D is very important. Many people do not have enough. We should get some sun every day. Or we can eat foods like fish, eggs, and milk. Some people may need a vitamin D supplement. But it is best to talk to a doctor first.

So remember to check your vitamin D level. It can make a big difference in your health. Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation:
大家好，我是Lulu。英语日常练习的第21天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。

今天我看了一个关于维生素D的视频。视频解释了为什么维生素D对我们的健康如此重要。它还谈到了很多人没有摄入足够的维生素D。演讲者是一位医生。他分享了一些医学案例来展示效果。

维生素D和其他维生素不同。我们的身体可以在晒太阳时产生它。但很多人大部分时间都待在室内。所以他们无法产生足够的维生素D。医生说世界上大约40%的人维生素D水平偏低。这是一个很大的数字。

维生素D帮助我们的身体利用钙。钙对强壮的骨骼很重要。没有足够的维生素D，骨骼会变得脆弱，容易骨折。医生展示了一个年轻女性的案例。她的腿和背部疼痛。她一直感到疲倦。她的血液检查显示维生素D非常低。服用维生素D三个月后，她的疼痛消失了。她感觉好多了。

另一个案例是一个孩子。这个孩子有软骨头。这被称为佝偻病。现在不常见，但仍然会发生。这个孩子不怎么外出。他不吃含有维生素D的食物。医生给他维生素D，并告诉他在阳光下玩耍。几个月后，他的骨骼变得更强壮了。

维生素D也有助于我们的免疫系统。它帮助我们抵抗疾病。医生说维生素D水平低的人更容易生病。他们可能更容易感冒或得流感。在一项研究中，每天服用维生素D的人感冒更少。

从这个视频中，我了解到维生素D非常重要。很多人没有足够的维生素D。我们应该每天晒点太阳。或者我们可以吃像鱼、鸡蛋和牛奶这样的食物。有些人可能需要补充维生素D。但最好先咨询医生。

所以记得检查你的维生素D水平。它会对你的健康产生很大影响。谢谢聆听，明天见。
concise_english:
Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 21 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I watched a video about vitamin D. A doctor explained its importance. He said many people lack vitamin D. About 40% of people have low levels.

Vitamin D helps our body use calcium. It keeps bones strong. Without it, bones can become weak. The doctor shared a case of a woman with bone pain. After taking vitamin D, she felt better.

Another case was a child with soft bones. The child got vitamin D and played in the sun. His bones got stronger.

Vitamin D also helps our immune system. People with low vitamin D get sick more often.

From this I learned that vitamin D is very important. We should get some sun or eat foods like fish and eggs. Some people may need supplements. But talk to a doctor first.

Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
concise_chinese:
大家好，我是Lulu。英语日常练习的第21天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。

今天我看了一个关于维生素D的视频。一位医生解释了它的重要性。他说很多人缺乏维生素D。大约40%的人水平偏低。

维生素D帮助我们的身体利用钙。它保持骨骼强壮。没有它，骨骼会变弱。医生分享了一个骨痛女性的案例。服用维生素D后，她感觉好多了。

另一个案例是一个有软骨头的小孩。孩子服用了维生素D并在阳光下玩耍。他的骨骼变强壮了。

维生素D也有助于我们的免疫系统。维生素D水平低的人更容易生病。

从中我了解到维生素D非常重要。我们应该晒点太阳或吃像鱼和鸡蛋这样的食物。有些人可能需要补充剂。但先咨询医生。

谢谢聆听，明天见。
